name: The only way is UP
description:
🗝️ // Horror , Mystery

You find yourself in a nightmarish world filled with unbelievable horrors. Luckily , you meet a mysterious (and maybe slightly crazy) old man who who gives you hope to find a way out: there is a rumour that the only way to leave is through the tower that pierces the clouds. However so far, no one brave enough to enter had ever made it out.

🗝️Eight levels need to be mastered.

🗝️This place is beyond logic. Each level seems to lead into another pocket dimension.

🗝️Why do the keepers seem just as confused ( and disturbed ) as you are?

🔸Moodboard🔸

[ Google drive link ]

[ link for the Trailer]

[Playlist]

🗝️// The tower sticks out amongst the other ruins. It is so high i pierces through the clouds. It is rumoured to be the only way out, however no one had returned from this journey to tell the tale.

🗝️//The core is a gigantic round structure and consists of a winding staircase that leads to the different levels. It is eerily quiet inside

🗝️//Level 1: the Ballroom

this place looks like a cursed Fairytale. It consists actually of seemingly endless identical ballrooms that are interconnected . Roses climb up the interconnected walls and a faint orchestra seems to play in a distance one can meter reach. However what stick out most are the dancers that seem to be frozen in time.

🗝️//Level: 2 : the Hospital

This Hospital is sadly not as abandoned as it seems. Make sure you don't get caught by the staff, even better if you stay away from Pathology. You really don't want to meet the doctor there. He has a strange defenition of 'Treatment'.

🗝️// Level 3: the mansion

Make sure to leave everything as pristine as it is if you don't want to get cut half by the maid that keeps this place clean

🗝️//Level 4: the mirror maze:

Besides the obvious challenge to try to get out of a maze, also try to not get your face ripped off by the entity that lives there

Level 5: the Slaugherhouse

Try not to get caught if you don't want to end up as a steak. Here the animals hunt the humans instead.

Level 6: the city.

Finally you meet someone normal for once, who tells you about a horrific serial killer that is roaming around the streets. Can you two make it out alive?

Level 7: the Orchestra

Honor the perform
creator: Aquanautz
